SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

This Shareholders Agreement (the "Agreement") is made and entered into as of the 15th day of June, 2023, by and among the following parties:

1. Dr. John Tan, NRIC No. S2345678A, residing at 123 Fictional Road, #05-67, Singapore 123456. Contact: +65 9123 4567, Email: johntan@fictionmail.sg.

2. Ms. Emily Wong, NRIC No. S3456789B, residing at 456 Imaginary Avenue, #12-34, Singapore 234567. Contact: +65 9876 5432, Email: emilywong@imagimail.sg.

3. Skyline Ventures Pte. Ltd., UEN T09LL1234K, with its registered office at 789 Example Street, #08-90, Singapore 345678. Contact: +65 8765 4321, Email: contact@skylineventures.sg.

RECITALS

WHEREAS, the parties desire to enter into this Agreement to set forth their mutual rights and obligations as shareholders of Fictional Company Pte. Ltd.

WHEREAS, the parties have agreed to a Share Purchase Agreement (the "SPA") involving a capital investment of SGD 500,000.

AGREEMENT

1. The parties agree that no significant changes to the project plan shall be undertaken without unanimous consent.

2. Reference to the SPA herein shall include all terms detailed within the Share Purchase Agreement document.

3. Any disputes arising from this Agreement shall be resolved in accordance with Singapore law.

For identification purposes, Emily Wong's profile can be accessed at https://example.sg/user/S3456789B.
